meta_title: For Students: project management to Solve no marketing skills (Beginner Tutorial)
meta_description: Learn how to project management and overcome no marketing skills. A Beginner-level Tutorial using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: Project Management for Students: Solving No Marketing Skills
content.seo_description: Overcome the 'no marketing skills' hurdle by leveraging project management. A beginner-friendly guide using Antigravity and Claude Code for your first app.
content.answer_block: You don't need a marketing degree to launch; you need a system. By treating your project like a product roadmap, you replace guesswork with execution. Use Antigravity to structure your backlog and Claude Code to accelerate development, ensuring your app delivers tangible value that markets itself through utility.
content.intro:
The blank screen of a portfolio project is daunting enough, but the silent panic of 'no marketing skills' is what kills most student dreams before they even ship. You feel like you're building in a vacuum, waiting for an audience that doesn't exist, terrified that your code will remain hidden in a dusty GitHub repository forever.

But here is the secret the pros won't tell you: engineering is its own form of marketing. When you build with a rigid, logical project management framework, you create a product that solves a real problem. This tutorial turns your technical project into a self-promoting engine, using modern AI tools to ensure your output is as polished as your ambition.

steps.title: Define the Value-First Roadmap
steps.description: Stop coding features and start coding solutions. We map your project against a specific user pain point to ensure your code has inherent marketing appeal.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze my project idea and generate a 4-week MVP roadmap focusing on high-utility features that solve a specific user problem.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run --task 'Create a project.md file with a 4-week roadmap based on the user pain point analysis.'

steps.title: Automate the Project Backlog
steps.description: Use Antigravity to translate your roadmap into granular, actionable tasks so you never lose momentum or focus.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Break down the roadmap into a JSON-formatted task list with priority levels and estimated time for each task.

steps.title: Build the Core Utility Engine
steps.description: Focus on the 'killer feature' that provides immediate value. This is your primary marketing asset.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Draft the architectural foundation for the core feature, ensuring it is modular and easily demoable for a portfolio.

steps.title: Implement Auto-Documentation
steps.description: Marketing is just communication. Use Claude Code to generate technical docs that explain the 'why' behind your code, perfect for recruiters.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a README.md that highlights the user-centric problem solved by this project and the technical decisions made.

steps.title: Final QA and Launch Preparation
steps.description: Refine the user journey to ensure your project is ready for public view and feedback.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Conduct a mock code review focusing on performance and user experience, suggesting improvements for a production-ready state.

pro_tips: Treat every bug fix as a feature improvement in your commit history to show potential employers how you solve real-world problems.
Use your project documentation as your LinkedIn content; post one technical 'lesson learned' per week during development.
Focus on 'Time-to-First-Value'—if a user can't see the benefit of your app in 30 seconds, your project management needs to prioritize UI/UX.
Leverage Claude Code to write tests; high test coverage is the ultimate proof of a professional engineer to any recruiter.
Build a 'Public Roadmap' file in your repo; it shows you understand product management, which is a rare skill for junior developers.
content.next_steps: Once your project is live, share your README on social media platforms like X or LinkedIn, tagging the tools you used to build it.
content.conversion_block: You now have the framework to turn code into a career-defining asset. Stop worrying about marketing and start building products that prove your expertise. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
